metadata.description: Open the vendor portal home at the provided base_url.
Navigate to the settlements workspace or page, using likely paths or workspace selector under base_url/workspaces/settlements or /settlements.
Read the DOM of the settlements or chargebacks page to locate the chargeback table and export/download CSV controls (buttons/links/forms).
Click the 'Export CSV' or 'Download' button/link for the chargebacks/chargeback report.
Download the resulting CSV file from the triggered link or form submission.

planner.rationale: Portal likely has a settlements workspace with a chargebacks page and CSV export. Plan: navigate to base, find 'Settlements' or workspace, read DOM to locate chargebacks/export controls, click export, then download CSV. Keep actions minimal and use read_dom to inspect before click/submit. Single submit or download action if available.
